quotes.name: Monica S.
quotes.text: I used to train at CrossFit but the cardio was just too much. I wasn't able to gain muscle because I was burning so many calories and didn't have the proper nutritional guidance. Ever since starting Hyrax everything has changed. I'm stronger, healthier, and feel like I have more energy than ever.

quotes.name: Priya K.
quotes.text: I travel for work three weeks out of the month and could never stick to a program. Hyrax sessions are short enough to fit into a hotel gym or a park near the airport. The customized routines adjust to whatever equipment I have access to that week.

quotes.name: James R.
quotes.text: The diet plan alone was worth the upgrade. I was eating well but not eating right for how I train. Within a few weeks my recovery improved and I stopped hitting that afternoon wall. The personal trainer adjustments each week keep things fresh too.
